headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -159.3)
key_insights: Fears trending up 96% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-2.26)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 148 quotes and an overwhelming 134 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today.
• The frustration score of 130.7 sits near the top of the 81-day range, marking one of the most heated periods recently.
• Frustrations more than doubled from yesterday (60.2 to 130.7) while fears recovered significantly from their recent low.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
